creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
just built off main-21d7ac8c7 https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=21d7ac8c79a34cf3b7205d0c32014ee39f1f28ab on an 8-core A1.Flex and
this appears now to be fixed. 

dmesg, efivars, kenv etc here https://gist.github.com/dch/ca502f33d3a046b18eae07945a491206

Not clear what addressed this between git log --oneline c87b3f0..21d7ac8c7
but LGTM thanks!
